en_title: Capcom Explains How Tifa From Final Fantasy 7 Came to Be a Street Fighter 6 DLC Character
cn_title: 卡普空揭秘《最终幻想7》蒂法如何加入《街头霸王6》
subtitle: 牵线搭桥三年成
opus_summary: 卡普空透露，《街头霸王6》的蒂法联动始于三年前，因一位在史克威尔艾尼克斯工作的共同朋友牵线。蒂法将保留《最终幻想7》的格斗风格，并加入独特的魔晶石系统。其设计由野村哲也最终审核。第四年季票包含蒂法等四名角色，蒂法预计2027年初上线。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has discussed the eye-catching inclusion of Tifa from Final Fantasy 7 came to be a guest DLC character in Street Fighter 6, and explained why she’s a perfect fit for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空近日谈到了《最终幻想7》的蒂法如何成为《街头霸王6》的客串DLC角色，并解释了为何她与这款游戏完美契合。

paragraphs.en: The announcement of Tifa as one of Street Fighter 6’s Year 4 DLC characters, alongside Yasmine, Arjun, and Bosch, was one of the standout moments of Summer Game Fest 2026 . Tekken fans had hoped for Tifa to make her way to Bandai Namco’s game, but instead she’s gone with Street Fighter 6. So, how did it happen?
paragraphs.cn: 蒂法作为《街头霸王6》第四年DLC角色之一（与亚思洺、阿俊和巴什一同）的公布，是2026年夏日游戏节最引人注目的时刻之一。《铁拳》粉丝曾希望蒂法能加入万代南梦宫的游戏，但她最终选择了《街头霸王6》。那么，这一切是如何发生的呢？

paragraphs.en: IGN’s Simon Cardy spoke with Street Fighter director Takayuki Nakayama and producer Shuhei Matsumoto to find out. It turns out the pair have a mutual friend who works at Square Enix, who they began talking to about a collaboration of some kind around three years ago. These talks led to the request for Tifa, which proved successful.
paragraphs.cn: IGN的Simon Cardy采访了《街头霸王》总监中山贵之与制作人松本修平，以了解内情。原来，两人有一位在史克威尔艾尼克斯工作的共同朋友，大约三年前他们开始与这位朋友讨论某种形式的合作。这些对话最终促成了对蒂法的请求，并获得了成功。

paragraphs.en: “The initial conversation began roughly three years ago,” Nakayama explained. “We have a mutual friend who works at Square Enix, who's also a big fan of Street Fighter 6. We’d been discussing about, what can we do to collaborate somehow? And then eventually those conversations led to, what about a potential guest character from one of their IPs or series?
paragraphs.cn: 「最初的对话大约在三年前开始，」中山解释道，「我们有一位在史克威尔艾尼克斯工作的共同朋友，他也是《街头霸王6》的忠实粉丝。我们一直在讨论，能做些什么来合作呢？最终，这些对话引向了——是否可以从他们的IP或系列中引入一个客串角色？」

paragraphs.en: “And around that time the Final Fantasy 7 remake series was very active, and looking at the character background, a character like Tifa, who has a heavy martial arts style, we thought that it would be perfect for Street Fighter 6. So it kind of organically led to this happening.”
paragraphs.cn: 「而那时《最终幻想7》重制系列正非常活跃，考虑到角色背景，像蒂法这样拥有浓厚武术风格的角色，我们认为她与《街头霸王6》完美契合。所以，事情就这样自然而然地发生了。」

paragraphs.en: Street Fighter 6 released three years ago, in June 2023, so those talks occurred very early in the game’s life, or perhaps even before it came out. By that time Final Fantasy 7 remake was in full flow, having launched in 2020 and with Rebirth coming out in 2024. The third game in the remake trilogy, Revelation, is due out in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 《街头霸王6》于三年前（2023年6月）发售，因此这些对话发生在游戏生命周期的早期，甚至可能是在发售之前。当时，《最终幻想7 重制版》已全面展开，该作于2020年推出，而《重生》于2024年发售。重制三部曲的第三部《启示录》预计于2027年推出。

paragraphs.en: As for how Tifa will actually work in Street Fighter 6, Nakayama kept his cards close to his chest, but did confirm that she will have the same fighting style she uses in Final Fantasy 7. But there is something special about her mechanics: she has “materia-induced” gameplay that is specific to Tifa. How this actually works, though, remains a mystery for now. Here's the official blurb on Tifa from Capcom:
paragraphs.cn: 至于蒂法在《街头霸王6》中具体如何运作，中山守口如瓶，但他确认蒂法将保留她在《最终幻想7》中的格斗风格。不过，她的机制有些特别：她拥有蒂法专属的「魔晶石驱动」玩法。然而，这具体如何运作目前仍是个谜。以下是卡普空关于蒂法的官方介绍：

paragraphs.en: In terms of Tifa’s Street Fighter 6 design, Matsumoto confirmed that Square Enix — and, specifically, Final Fantasy 7 lead character designer Tetsuya Nomura — has final say.
paragraphs.cn: 关于蒂法在《街头霸王6》中的设计，松本确认史克威尔艾尼克斯——具体来说是《最终幻想7》首席角色设计师野村哲也——拥有最终决定权。

paragraphs.en: “When designing Tifa as a character for Street Fighter 6, a lot of reference materials were provided from the Final Fantasy 7 team for the Capcom designers to create and implement into the game,” he explained. “A lot of things were taken into consideration, like the exaggerations that are required for, for example, when a punch or a kick lands. Ultimately that gets reviewed by the team at Square Enix, including [Tetsuya] Nomura-san from the Final Fantasy 7 team. And then once that's approved, then it's up to the developers on the Capcom side to implement into the game.”
paragraphs.cn: 「在设计蒂法作为《街头霸王6》角色时，《最终幻想7》团队提供了大量参考资料，供卡普空的设计师创作并植入游戏中，」他解释道，「我们考虑了很多因素，比如拳脚命中时所需的夸张表现。最终，这些设计会由史克威尔艾尼克斯团队审核，包括《最终幻想7》团队的野村哲也先生。一旦获得批准，就由卡普空方面的开发者将其实装到游戏中。」

paragraphs.en: The Street Fighter 6 Year 4 Character and Ultimate pass sees Yasmine release on August 3, Arjun this fall, Tifa early 2027, and Bosch during the spring.
paragraphs.cn: 《街头霸王6》第四年角色通行证和终极通行证中，亚思洺将于8月3日上线，阿俊于今年秋季，蒂法于2027年初，巴什于春季上线。

paragraphs.en: But what happens after the Year 4 DLC characters are all released? With Street Fighter 6 now in its fourth year, some are wondering how much life it has left. Capcom recently announced the game had sold 7 million copies, an impressive milestone that’s not far behind Street Fighter 5’s total of 7.9 million copies sold. Before Street Fighter 6’s launch, Capcom had said it wanted the sequel to eventually outsell its predecessor, targeting over 10 million copies sold over the course of its lifetime.
paragraphs.cn: 但在第四年DLC角色全部发布之后呢？《街头霸王6》现已进入第四年，一些人开始好奇它还有多少生命力。卡普空最近宣布该作已售出700万份，这是一个令人印象深刻的里程碑，与《街头霸王5》总计790万份的销量相差不远。在《街头霸王6》发售前，卡普空曾表示希望这款续作最终能超越前作，目标是整个生命周期内销量超过1000万份。

paragraphs.en: Street Fighter 6 has some way to go before it hits that milestone, but Capcom sounds happy with where things are at, and it has promised to continue to support the game. Street Fighter 7, it seems, is not coming any time soon.
paragraphs.cn: 《街头霸王6》距离这一里程碑还有一段路要走，但卡普空对现状表示满意，并承诺将继续支持这款游戏。看来，《街头霸王7》短期内不会问世。

paragraphs.en: “I personally want Street Fighter 6 to be running and operating for as long as possible,” Matsumoto told IGN. “When we initially kicked off the project, our internal goal was to hit that 10-year life cycle. But that's why we’re working so hard to improve the quality of the game and to make sure that the characters we introduce are attractive and appealing.
paragraphs.cn: 「我个人希望《街头霸王6》能尽可能长久地运营下去，」松本告诉IGN，「当我们最初启动这个项目时，内部目标是达到10年的生命周期。正因如此，我们才如此努力地提升游戏品质，确保我们推出的角色具有吸引力和魅力。」

paragraphs.en: “And the question regarding Street Fighter 7, that's not something we’re really thinking about right now. We’re seeing a lot of new players coming into the game right now and we want to continue catering to that particular audience. So Street Fighter 6 and maintaining its longevity is the main focus.”
paragraphs.cn: 「至于《街头霸王7》的问题，我们现在并没有真正考虑。我们看到很多新玩家正在涌入这款游戏，我们希望继续满足这一特定受众的需求。因此，《街头霸王6》及其长期运营是我们的主要关注点。」

paragraphs.en: Nakayama then teased that there’s a lot more that he wants to do for Street Fighter 6, but wouldn’t be drawn on what exactly. “There's stuff that I’m thinking, but I don’t want to spoil the fun for everyone!” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 中山随后透露，他还有很多想为《街头霸王6》做的事情，但不愿具体说明。「我有些想法，但不想剧透大家的乐趣！」他说道。

paragraphs.en: The upcoming Street Fighter live-action movie may give Street Fighter 6 a shot in the arm. It’s due out October 16, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 即将上映的《街头霸王》真人电影可能会为《街头霸王6》注入一剂强心针。该片定于2026年10月16日上映。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他。也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系Wesley。
